Visual Communication Design Department Graduate Gizem Özkol in BASE 2020 Selection

Faculty of Communication, Department of Visual Communication Design 2020 graduate Gizem Özkol’s “the Turn of Mind” series; Among 1200 applications from new graduates of 76 universities, it was entitled to take part in the BASE selection as a result of the jury evaluations. We congratulate Gizem, a graduate of our department, for her outstanding success, especially for her devoted efforts in this period, and wish her continued success.
